ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year the student enrolled in the university */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "graduation_year" INTEGER /* Expected or actual graduation year of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "department" INTEGER /* Department that offers the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits the course is worth */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who teaches the course */,
  "pre_requisites" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of pre-requisite courses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance record */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the performance record */,
  "DGPA" REAL /* Degree Grade Point Average of the student */,
  "university_rank" INTEGER /* University rank achieved by the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Letter grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "is_honors" INTEGER /* Indicates if the student received honors for the course */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the department */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the department */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_ranks" (
  "rank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rank record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the rank is recorded */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall university rank for that year */,
  "national_rank" INTEGER /* National ranking of the university */,
  "global_rank" INTEGER /* Global ranking of the university */,
  "ranking_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking data */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who received the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., academic, leadership) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "presented_by" TEXT /* Who presented the award */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the award was presented */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the resource is associated with */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., lab, seminar, library) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the resource */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the resource */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_resources" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage event */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student using the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was used */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of resource usage (in hours) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of resource usage */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the student about the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_resources_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_resources_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)
